'''Thula''' was a talented swindler and [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]]. She and the [[Umbaran/Legends|Umbaran]] [[Squa Tront]] were employed by the [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] agent [[Kaird]]. They both had to infiltrate the sending system and stole the [[Bota/Legends|Bota]]. Then, they had to encase the product in [[Carbonite/Legends|carbonite]] and sent it to Kaird, in order to be property of the Black Sun. Instead of following the [[Nediji]]'s plan, Thula and Squa betrayed Kaird and filled the carbonite case with explosives. Kaird narrowly escaped death and vowed revenge, but Thula and Squa had flown away.

==Appearances==
*''[[MedStar II: Jedi Healer]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Coruscant Nights I: Jedi Twilight]]'' {{Mo}}
